jobs.prompt: Editorial illustration on warm cream parchment background, three quiet vignettes side by side: on the left, several small separate trees of plain circles whose roots reach toward each other and merge into one larger tree; in the center, two parallel horizontal threads of beads slide past each other with a soft terracotta glow where a run of beads aligns perfectly, suggesting pattern matching; on the right, one wide tree of plain circles whose branches share a common trunk before splitting apart, suggesting shared prefixes. All nodes and beads are plain empty shapes. Absolutely no text, no letters, no digits, no numerals, no labels. Deep ink outlines, dusty blue and terracotta accents, generous negative space, quiet premium academic atmosphere.
